name: Sweet and Sour Cabbage and Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Cabbage, Cut Into 1/2" Strips, About 6 Cups
1 1/2 cups Great Northern Beans, Cooked and Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients except beans.
2. Bring the cabbage mixture to a boil while stirring.
3. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add the beans to the cabbage and cook an additional 5 minutes to heat through.
Yield: 4 servings
Note: This dish serves 4 as a main entree and 6 as an accompaniment. According to the book, it contains 192 calories, 0.7g fat, 0mg cholesterol, 7.2g fiber, and 54mg sodium.
